data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_WelcomeTo: Hello and welcome to the DEVON\nCORPORATION.\pWe're proud producers of items and\nmedicine that enhance your life.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_StaffGotR: One of our research staff stupidly\ngot robbed of an important parcel.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_ThoseShoe: Hey, those RUNNING SHOES!\nThey're one of our products!\pIt makes me happy when I see someone\nusing something we made.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_RobberWas: That stolen parcel...\pWell, sure it's important, but it's not\nanything that anyone can use.\pIn my estimation, that robber must not\nhave been very bright.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_SoundsLik: It sounds like they've recovered\nthe ripped-off DEVON GOODS.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_OnlyAutho: I'm sorry, only authorized people\nare allowed to enter here.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_HowCouldW: It's beyond stupid.\nHow could we get robbed?
